artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
removed_or_excluded_refs: Advanced task: Precision agriculture nitrogen prescription. Data: zones Z1 area=12ac NDVI=0.62 soil_N=18ppm yield_goal=190bu; Z2 area=9 NDVI=0.48 soil_N=11 yield_goal=175; Z3 area=15 NDVI=0.71 soil_N=24 yield_goal=205. Rule: base_N=0.9*yield_goal - soil_N*4; reduce 15% if NDVI>0.68; increase 10% if NDVI<0.50. Produce per-zone prescription (units: lbs N/acre) and total fertilizer (lbs N) estimate. Include intermediate calculations, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final dec

Artifact previews (CSV and markdown), actual_outputs computed_results, and trace steps all contain the same numerical values and the same formula application. Evidence refs: attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] Trace steps show compute and write_artifacts steps that produced those files.
find artifacts -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort && sed -n '1,80p' [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] && sed -n '1,240p' [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]

node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const csv=fs.readFileSync("[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]","utf8").trim().split(/\r?\n/); if(csv[0]!=="zone_id,area_ac,NDVI,soil_N_ppm,yield_goal_bu_ac,base_N_lbsN_ac,adjusted_N_lbsN_ac,total_N_lbs,notes") throw new Error("CSV header mismatch"); const rows=csv.slice(1).map(r=>r.split(/,(?=(?:[^"]*"[^"]*")*[^"]*$)/)); if(rows.length!==3) throw new Error("Expected 3 data rows"); const totals=rows.map(r=>Number(r[7])); const sum=totals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); const exp
